architecture.summary: Event queue model for sync — all triggers write to pending.jsonl, stop-sync.sh processes at session end. Simplified sync-setup detects single vs multi from childRepos count.

integrations.summary: Affects GitHub/JIRA/ADO sync triggers. No auth changes. Keeps gh CLI compatibility. sync.mode config for queued vs immediate.

ui-ux.summary: Sync-setup wizard simplified from 10+ questions to 3-5. Single-project: tracker + project name + validate. Multi: per-childRepo targets.

performance.summary: Core goal: eliminate 4x API call multiplication from quadruple triggers. Queue model ensures 1 sync per increment per session.

security.summary: No credential changes. Event queue is local file (pending.jsonl). No secrets in queue data.

edge-cases.summary: sync.mode: immediate for users needing real-time sync. specweave complete keeps direct sync (explicit user action). Queue corruption: stop-sync.sh already handles malformed JSONL lines.
